info.title: TapKit API
info.description: REST API for controlling iPhones programmatically via Switch Control.

get.description: List all phones for the organization.

schema.title: Response List Phones V1 Phones Get

get.description: List recent agent tasks for a phone.

post.description:
Start an agent task on a phone.

The agent will autonomously control the phone to complete the instruction.
It takes screenshots, analyzes them with Claude, and executes actions.

Returns immediately with task info - use websocket events to track progress.

get.description: Get agent task status and steps.

post.description: Resume a blocked or stopped agent task.

get.description: Get the cached app list for a phone. Refreshes from Mac if not cached.

post.description:
Load text into the phone's clipboard via the iOS Shortcut.

Enqueues a copy_text action for the iOS Shortcut to pick up, then invokes
the copy shortcut via Switch Control so the phone polls, grabs the text,
and copies it to its clipboard.

Double tap at a location described by a text selector.

Flow:
1. Take screenshot
2. Resolve selector to (x, y) via vision service
3. Execute double tap at (x, y)

Drag from one element to another using text selectors.

Flow:
1. Take screenshot
2. Resolve both selectors to (x, y) coordinates via vision service
3. Execute drag from first element to second element

Flick from a location described by a text selector.

Flow:
1. Take screenshot
2. Resolve selector to (x, y) via vision service
3. Execute flick at (x, y) in specified direction

Open an app by name.

Flow:
1. Get installed app list from Mac
2. LLM fuzzy-match app name to bundle ID
3. Enqueue shortcut action to open by bundle ID

Pinch at a location described by a text selector.

Flow:
1. Take screenshot
2. Resolve selector to (x, y) via vision service
3. Execute pinch at (x, y) with specified action

get.description:
Get a screenshot from the phone.

The Mac app captures the screenshot and uploads it via HTTP POST to
/jobs/{job_id}/upload, then signals completion via Socket.IO.

In sync mode, we wait for the upload and return the PNG directly.
In async mode, returns job_id - use GET /jobs/{job_id}/download to retrieve.

patch.description:
Update phone settings.

Allows updating typing_method and speed settings for a phone.
Only provided fields will be updated; omitted fields remain unchanged.

get.description: Get real-time status for a specific phone.

post.description:
Leave a stream as a viewer without stopping it.

Decrements the viewer count. If viewer count reaches 0, the stream
is automatically stopped.

Start streaming a phone to Agora, or join an existing stream.

Returns viewer credentials for the web app to join the stream.
If stream is not active, signals the Mac app to start publishing.
Each viewer gets a unique UID for multi-viewer support.

get.description: Check stream status for a phone.

post.description:
Stop streaming a phone.

Signals the Mac app to stop publishing to the Agora channel.

Tap and hold at a location described by a text selector.

Flow:
1. Take screenshot
2. Resolve selector to (x, y) via vision service
3. Execute tap and hold at (x, y)

Tap at a location described by a text selector.

Flow:
1. Take screenshot
2. Resolve selector to (x, y) via vision service
3. Execute tap at (x, y)

In async mode, returns job_id immediately and steps continue in background.
In sync mode, waits for all steps to complete.

Type text.

Supports multiple methods:
- keys: Creates pending type request for keyboard extension to poll and type
- paste: Creates pending type request for paste-based typing
- shortcut: Uses iOS Shortcut to copy text to clipboard, then pastes via vision-guided hold+tap

For 'shortcut' method: Assumes user is focused on a text field with keyboard visible.
Start a new E2B agent session.

get.description: List sessions for the authenticated org.
Get buffered events for a session (for polling).

post.description: Send a follow-up message to the agent.

get.description: Get overall status of the system for this org.

PhoneSettingsUpdate.title: PhoneSettingsUpdate
PhoneSettingsUpdate.description: Request model for updating phone settings.

SpeedSetting.title: SpeedSetting
SpeedSetting.description:
Phone speed setting for Switch Control scanning.

Higher values = faster scanning speed.

ApiKeyAuth.name: X-API-Key
ApiKeyAuth.description: API key starting with joot_ prefix
